opportunities.title: [Hiring] AI Video Editor — Short Property Walkthrough Videos — $15/hr
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] AI Video Editor — Short Property Walkthrough Videos — $15/hr

Looking for someone comfortable with AI image-to-video tools (Kling, Runway, Luma, or similar) to help me create short walkthrough-style videos from property photos. What the job involves: I'll send you 5-7 photos of a property (interior/exterior shots) You'll run them through an AI image-to-video tool to create short clips (camera pans/push-ins, realistic motion) Stitch the clips together into one smooth 25-35 second walkthrough video with light music/captions Deliver as an MP4 Pay: $15/hr, paid per video (should take unde
